author: @shoppersync
text: Blinkit UI makes it impossible to browse for new snacks. I just end up ordering my usual Lays and coke because the explore page is cluttered with things I don't want.

author: @techy_mum
text: Love the 10 min delivery but wish Blinkit would recommend products based on my past purchases. I never visit the electronics or makeup categories.

author: @delhi_foodie
text: Trying to find niche ingredients on Blinkit is a pain. The search works, but discovery is zero. You only buy what you already know you need.
